chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.text: The application for a permit under Section 623.121 (Permit to Move Portable Building Unit) must:
state the make and model of the portable building unit or units;
state the length and width of the portable building unit or units;
state the make and model of the towing vehicle;
state the length and width of the towing vehicle;
state the length and width of the combined portable building unit or units and towing vehicle;
state each highway over which the portable building unit or units are to be moved;
indicate the point of origin and destination; and
be dated and signed by the applicant.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
